他的代表作品有《冥婚》《奇门遁甲》等，曾连续三年被评为“中国电子阅读最受欢迎作家”，作品被翻译成多种文字。
本书为周德东惊悚悬疑作品全集，共32册。
作品目录：《门》《纸人》《奇门遁甲》《我遇见了我》《所有人都在撒谎》《谁摸了我一下》《黑段子》《九命猫》《三减一等于几》《天惶惶地惶惶》《三岔口》《失常》《罗布泊之咒第一季》《罗布泊之咒第二季》《罗布泊之咒第三季》《罗布泊之咒第四季》《罗布泊之咒第五季》《红都剧院24排4号》《冥婚》《第七感》《在地狱那头等我》《每夜一个练胆小故事》《每晚一个练胆大故事》《幽灵船》《偶人》《死亡之妆》《爱情啊，你别开花》《恐怖小说家周德东亲身经历的恐怖故事》《踩生人》《隔壁有人吗》《瘟疫》《爸爸的小情人》。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/06fa7f78552cb7d3cc6e39a23dc9e31a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"周德东","author_id":"","book_id":"7392578376755579928","book_name":"周德东惊悚悬疑作品全集（共32册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a8a898","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"9.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7530538118332550169","read_count":"4306","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4639527"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"1509","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/06fa7f78552cb7d3cc6e39a23dc9e31a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254694&x-signature=XKK7C9XeC7IsYEsRhRm5dhucY%2B8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"103"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113245453754DB5352F8AB8B8D8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13066,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3576},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537518257635410713","
